title: Free & Exercise modes
body: Switch between the free-form metronome and structured exercise practice here. You're in Free mode now.

title: Start and stop
body: The big button starts and stops the metronome, and pulses on every beat — brighter on accents. Spacebar works too.

title: Tempo
body: Click the tempo to set the BPM: type it, drag the slider, nudge by ±1/±5, or tap it out. Press T anywhere to tap.

title: Rep counter
body: Set how many reps to play and whether to auto-stop. The bar underneath fills as you go; press R to reset it.

title: Time, feel, dropout & ramp
body: Set the time signature and subdivision, drop the click out on a schedule, or ramp the tempo across reps — from these pills.

title: Library, history & settings
body: Browse exercise sets, review your practice history, and adjust settings from the sidebar.
